</section>

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,400;0,9..144,600;1,9..144,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');
/* ============================================================
   LP LAURA — CHECKLIST DIÁRIO (v3 — Cosmic Calm Premium)
   Design System PRO — dark azul cósmico (paleta do ebook)
   ============================================================ */

@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,400;0,9..144,600;1,9..144,600&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;600;700&display=swap');

/* ---------- 1. TOKENS ---------- */
:root {
  /* Base dark cósmica */
  --bg-primary:     #0A0E27;
  --bg-secondary:   #131842;
  --bg-card:        #1A2050;
  --bg-elevated:    #252C6B;
  --bg-overlay:     rgba(10, 14, 39, 0.85);

  /* Brand */
  --royal-blue:     #1E40AF;
  --electric-blue:  #3B82F6;
  --cyan-glow:      #60A5FA;
  --indigo-glow:    #6366F1;
  --violet-deep:    #8B5CF6;

  /* Accent warm */
  --gold:           #F59E0B;
  --gold-bright:    #FBBF24;
  --warm-pink:      #EC4899;

  /* Text */
  --text-primary:   #FFFFFF;
  --text-body:      #E2E8F0;
  --text-muted:     #94A3B8;
  --text-faint:     #64748B;

  /* Borders */
  --border-subtle:  rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.12);
  --border-normal:  rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.25);
  --border-strong:  rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.45);
  --border-gold:    rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.4);

  /* Gradients */
  --gradient-cta:          linear-gradient(135deg, #3B82F6 0%, #6366F1 50%, #8B5CF6 100%);
  --gradient-hero-bg:      radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, #1E40AF 0%, #131842 25%, #0A0E27 60%);
  --gradient-card:         linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.15) 0%, rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.05) 100%);
  --gradient-badge-gold:   linear-gradient(135deg, #F59E0B 0%, #EC4899 100%);
  --gradient-number-outline: linear-gradient(180deg, #60A5FA 0%, #3B82F6 100%);
  --gradient-border-glow:  linear-gradient(135deg, #3B82F6, #8B5CF6, #EC4899);

  /* Shadows */
  --shadow-glow-blue:   0 0 48px -8px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.45);
  --shadow-glow-indigo: 0 0 64px -12px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.55);
  --shadow-glow-gold:   0 0 40px -8px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.5);
  --shadow-card:        0 12px 48px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.12);
  --shadow-cta:         0 16px 48px -12px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
  --shadow-elevated:    0 24px 64px -16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75), 0 0 0 1px rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.2);

  /* Typography */
  --font-display: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-body:    'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono:    'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace;
  --font-serif:   'Fraunces', Georgia, serif;

  --text-xs:   clamp(0.688rem, 0.65rem + 0.2vw, 0.75rem);
  --text-sm:   clamp(0.75rem, 0.7rem + 0.25vw, 0.813rem);
  --text-base: clamp(0.875rem, 0.85rem + 0.15vw, 0.938rem);
  --text-lg:   clamp(0.938rem, 0.875rem + 0.3vw, 1.063rem);
  --text-xl:   clamp(1rem, 0.95rem + 0.3vw, 1.188rem);
  --text-2xl:  clamp(1.125rem, 1rem + 0.625vw, 1.5rem);
  --text-3xl:  clamp(1.375rem, 1.125rem + 1.25vw, 2rem);
  --text-4xl:  clamp(1.5rem, 1.25rem + 1.25vw, 2.25rem);
  --text-5xl:  clamp(1.75rem, 1.375rem + 1.875vw, 2.75rem);
  --text-6xl:  clamp(2.25rem, 1.75rem + 2.5vw, 3.5rem);
  --text-hero: clamp(1.75rem, 1rem + 2vw, 2.75rem);
  --text-mega: clamp(4rem, 2.5rem + 8vw, 10rem);

  /* Layout */
  --container-max: 1200px;
  --container-px-mobile: 1.25rem;
  --container-px-desktop: 2rem;

  --radius-sm:  6px;
  --radius-md:  12px;
  --radius-lg:  20px;
  --radius-xl:  28px;
  --radius-full: 9999px;
}

/* ---------- 2. RESET ---------- */
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
body {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: var(--text-body);
  background: var(--bg-primary);
  overflow-x: hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}
img, svg { max-width: 100%; display: block; height: auto; }
button { font: inherit; cursor: pointer; border: 0; background: transparent; color: inherit; }
a { color: var(--cyan-glow); text-decoration: none; transition: color .2s; }
a:hover { color: var(--gold-bright); }
:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--cyan-glow); outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; }

/* ---------- 3. LAYOUT BASE ---------- */
.container {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: var(--container-max);
  margin-inline: auto;
  padding-inline: var(--container-px-mobile);
}
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .container { padding-inline: var(--container-px-desktop); }
}

.section {
  padding-block: clamp(2rem, 3vw + 1rem, 4rem);
  background: var(--bg-primary);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.section--alt { background: var(--bg-secondary); }
/* ---------- MECANISMO CARD LAYOUT ---------- */
.mec-card {
  position: relative;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  background: var(--gradient-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  overflow: visible;
}
.mec-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: -1px;
  border-radius: inherit;
  padding: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--border-normal), transparent 50%, var(--border-normal));
  -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#000 0 0);
  -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask-composite: exclude;
  pointer-events: none;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .mec-card {
    grid-template-columns: 380px 1fr;
  }
}
.mec-card__visual {
  position: relative;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  min-height: 320px;
  z-index: 2;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .mec-card__visual {
    margin-left: -200px;
    margin-top: -4rem;
    margin-bottom: -4rem;
  }
}
.mec-card__layered {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%; left: -10%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  font: 900 clamp(7rem, 18vw, 14rem)/0.8 var(--font-display);
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 0%, transparent 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  pointer-events: none;
  user-select: none;
  z-index: 0;
}
.mec-card__img {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  max-width: 680px;
  width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: -4rem;
  margin-top: -2rem;
  width: 100%;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)) drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(59,130,246,0.3));
}
.mec-card__text {
  padding: 2.5rem 2.5rem 2.5rem 1.5rem;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}
.mec-card__text .eyebrow { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.mec-card__text h2 { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; font-size: var(--text-3xl); }
.mec-card__text p { margin-bottom: 0.875rem; font-size: var(--text-base); }
.mec-card__text .pull-quote {
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.mec-card__items {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0;
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
}
.mec-card__item {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 1.25rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.mec-card__item > div:last-child { flex: 1; }
.mec-chart-icon {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  align-self: flex-start;
}
.pillar-icon {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 48px; height: 48px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border-normal);
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  transition: background .3s, border-color .3s;
}
.pillar-icon svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }
.pillar:hover .pillar-icon {
  background: var(--gradient-cta);
  border-color: transparent;
  color: white;
}
.mec-card__item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.mec-card__item h4 { font-size: var(--text-sm); margin-bottom: 0.35rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FBBF24 0%, #F59E0B 50%, #D97706 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }
.mec-card__item p { font-size: var(--text-xs); color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.5; }
.mec-card__item cite { display: block; font: 400 0.625rem/1.4 var(--font-mono); color: var(--text-faint); margin-top: 0.35rem; font-style: normal; }
.mini-chart-top {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: grid;
  place-items: start;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.section--hero {
  background: var(--gradient-hero-bg);
  padding-block: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw + 1rem, 5rem) clamp(2rem, 3vw + 1rem, 4rem);
}
.section--hero::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.6'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  opacity: 0.04;
  pointer-events: none;
  mix-blend-mode: overlay;
}

/* ---------- 4. TYPOGRAPHY UTILITIES ---------- */
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: var(--font-display); color: var(--text-primary); }
h1 {
  font-size: var(--text-hero);
  line-height: 0.95;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
  font-weight: 700;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  word-break: normal;
  hyphens: none;
}
h2 { font-size: var(--text-4xl); line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.025em; font-weight: 700; }
.accent-grad {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #60A5FA 0%, #8B5CF6 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}
h3 { font-size: var(--text-2xl); line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.015em; font-weight: 600; }
h4 { font-size: var(--text-xl); line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 600; }
p { margin: 0; }
p + p { margin-top: 1rem; }

.lead { font-size: var(--text-lg); line-height: 1.55; color: var(--text-body); font-weight: 500; }

.eyebrow {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1.3 var(--font-mono);
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  padding: 0.55rem 1rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-normal);
  border-radius: var(--radius-full);
  background: rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.06);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  max-width: 100%;
}
.eyebrow::before {
  content: '';
  width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--cyan-glow);
  box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--cyan-glow);
}
.eyebrow--no-dot::before { display: none; }

.highlight {
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  font-weight: 600;
  position: relative;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.highlight::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: -2px;
  height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--cyan-glow), transparent);
}

.pull-quote {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: var(--text-3xl);
  line-height: 1.25;
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  padding: 2rem 0 2rem 2rem;
  border-left: 3px solid transparent;
  border-image: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--cyan-glow) 0%, transparent 100%) 1;
  margin: 2rem 0;
  max-width: 52ch;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFFFF 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0.25) 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}
.pull-quote strong { color: var(--text-primary); }

.section-head { max-width: 760px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.section-head--center { margin-inline: auto; text-align: center; }
.section-head p { margin-top: 1rem; color: var(--text-body); font-size: var(--text-lg); }

/* Drop cap para educação */
.dropcap::first-letter {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 4.5em;
  line-height: 0.85;
  float: left;
  margin: 0.1em 0.12em 0 0;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--cyan-glow), var(--electric-blue));
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}

/* ---------- 5. BUTTONS ---------- */
.btn {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: .6rem;
  font: 600 var(--text-base)/1 var(--font-body);
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  padding: 1.125rem 2.25rem;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  transition: transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease, background .3s ease;
  text-decoration: none;
  min-height: 52px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: center;
}
.btn-primary {
  background: var(--gradient-cta);
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-cta);
}
.btn-primary::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.28), transparent);
  transform: translateX(-100%);
  transition: transform .7s ease;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.btn-primary:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 24px 64px -12px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.75);
  color: #fff;
}
.js-motion .btn-primary:hover::before { transform: translateX(100%); }

@keyframes pulse-glow {
  0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 16px 48px -12px rgba(99,102,241,0.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(139,92,246,0.3); }
  50%      { box-shadow: 0 22px 72px -8px rgba(139,92,246,0.9), 0 0 0 1px rgba(236,72,153,0.45); }
}
.js-motion .btn-primary.is-pulsing { animation: pulse-glow 2.8s ease-in-out infinite; }

.btn-secondary {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
}
.btn-secondary:hover {
  background: rgba(96,165,250,0.08);
  border-color: var(--cyan-glow);
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
}

.btn-lg {
  font-size: var(--text-lg);
  padding: 1.35rem 2.75rem;
  min-height: 62px;
}
.btn-block { display: flex; width: 100%; }

.btn-arrow {
  display: inline-block;
  transition: transform .3s ease;
}
.btn:hover .btn-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); }

/* ---------- 6. NAV ---------- */
.nav {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 60;
  background: rgba(10, 14, 39, 0.75);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.nav__inner {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding-block: 1rem;
}
.nav__brand {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.125rem;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}
.nav__brand span { color: var(--cyan-glow); }
.nav__cta {
  font: 600 var(--text-sm)/1 var(--font-body);
  padding: 0.7rem 1.25rem;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background: var(--gradient-cta);
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px -8px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.5);
  transition: transform .3s;
}
.nav__cta:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); color: #fff; }

/* Nav urgency label (replaces brand) */
.nav__urgency {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  font: 600 var(--text-xs)/1.2 var(--font-body);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--gold-bright);
  white-space: nowrap;
  min-width: 0;
}
.nav__urgency-dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--gold-bright);
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--gold-bright);
  animation: navPulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes navPulse {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
  50% { opacity: 0.45; transform: scale(0.82); }
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .nav__urgency-dot { animation: none; }
}

/* Nav countdown timer (single MM:SS) */
.nav__timer {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-primary);
}
.nav__timer-num {
  font: 700 1.125rem/1 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;
  background: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
}
.nav__urgency-text {
  display: inline-block;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .nav__urgency {
    font-size: 0.5625rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    gap: 0.35rem;
  }
  .nav__urgency-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; }
  .nav__timer-num {
    font-size: 0.8125rem;
    padding: 0.3rem 0.55rem;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 420px) {
  .nav__urgency-text {
    max-width: 150px;
    white-space: normal;
    line-height: 1.2;
    font-size: 0.5rem;
  }
}

/* ---------- 7. HERO ---------- */
.hero { position: relative; }
.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(
    -35deg,
    transparent 0px, transparent 40px,
    rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.06) 40px, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.06) 42px
  );
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 1;
}
.hero__inner {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}
.hero__copy, .hero__visual { min-width: 0; }
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .hero__inner { grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 4rem; }
}
.hero__copy h1 { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.br-desktop { display: block; }
@media (max-width: 899px) { .br-desktop { display: none; } }
.hero__copy h1 .accent {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cyan-glow), var(--violet-deep));
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}
.hero__sub {
  font-size: var(--text-lg);
  line-height: 1.55;
  color: var(--text-body);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  max-width: 58ch;
}
.hero__cta-row {
  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1.25rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  align-items: center;
}
.hero__micro {
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1.5 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.hero__badges {
  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .hero__badges { flex-wrap: nowrap; }
}
/* Avatar stack social proof */
.hero__social-proof {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}
.avatar-stack {
  display: flex;
}
.avatar-stack__img {
  width: 40px; height: 40px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid var(--bg-primary);
  object-fit: cover;
  margin-left: -10px;
  animation: avatar-pop 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.avatar-stack__img:first-child { margin-left: 0; }
.avatar-stack__img:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0s; z-index: 4; }
.avatar-stack__img:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.5s; z-index: 3; }
.avatar-stack__img:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 1s; z-index: 2; }
.avatar-stack__img:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 1.5s; z-index: 1; }
@keyframes avatar-pop {
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(99,102,241,0); }
  50% { transform: scale(1.15); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(99,102,241,0.4); }
}
.hero__social-text {
  font: 500 var(--text-sm)/1.3 var(--font-body);
  color: var(--text-muted);
}
.hero__social-text strong { color: var(--text-primary); }
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .avatar-stack__img { animation: none; }
}

.hero__prehead {
  font: 500 var(--text-sm)/1.4 var(--font-body);
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.hero__offer {
  font: 600 var(--text-lg)/1.4 var(--font-display);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.price-old {
  color: #EF4444;
  text-decoration: line-through;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.price-new {
  color: #22C55E;
  font-size: 2em;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.price-limited {
  color: var(--gold);
}
.hero__badge {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .4rem;
  font: 500 0.563rem/1.3 var(--font-mono);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  background: rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.06);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-full);
  color: var(--text-muted);
}
.hero__badge::before {
  content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--gold);
  box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--gold);
}

.hero__visual {
  position: relative;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  min-height: 420px;
}
.hero__layered { display: none; }
.hero__mockup-wrap {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  padding: 0;
  max-width: none;
  width: 100%;
}
.hero__mockup-wrap::before,
.hero__mockup-wrap::after { display: none; }
.hero__mockup {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 720px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 32px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)) drop-shadow(0 0 48px rgba(59,130,246,0.35));
}

/* ---------- 7b. SECTION DIVIDER (as border-top) ---------- */
.section--with-divider {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.section--with-divider::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 5%, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.5) 30%, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.5) 70%, transparent 95%);
}
.section--with-divider::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 600px 500px at 10% 15%, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.09) 0%, transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 500px 600px at 85% 80%, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
  z-index: 0;
}
.hero__divider-icon {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -13px; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  z-index: 5;
  color: var(--gold);
  background: var(--bg-primary);
  padding: 2px 0.75rem;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
}

/* ---------- 7c. SECTION HEAD CENTER ---------- */
.section-head--center { text-align: center; }
.section-head--center h2 { max-width: 700px; margin-inline: auto; }

/* ---------- 7g. BORDER TOP + BOTTOM GRADIENT ---------- */
.section--border-top-bottom::before,
.section--border-top-bottom::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 3px;
  z-index: 3;
}
.section--border-top-bottom {
  background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(10,14,39,0.85), rgba(10,14,39,0.85)), url('https://expertlyadvice.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/scenes-bg.png');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  position: relative;
}
.section--border-top-bottom > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
.section--border-top-bottom::before {
  top: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 5%, rgba(96,165,250,0.5) 30%, rgba(96,165,250,0.5) 70%, transparent 95%);
}
.section--border-top-bottom::after {
  bottom: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 5%, rgba(96,165,250,0.5) 30%, rgba(96,165,250,0.5) 70%, transparent 95%);
}

/* ---------- 7f. BORDER LEFT GRADIENT ---------- */
.section--border-left::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0;
  width: 50%;
  height: 4px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--cyan-glow) 0%, var(--indigo-glow) 40%, transparent 100%);
  z-index: 3;
}

/* ---------- 7h. ABSTRACT BACKGROUND ---------- */
.section--abstract-bg {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.section--abstract-bg::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 400px 300px at 5% 20%, rgba(96,165,250,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 300px 400px at 90% 70%, rgba(139,92,246,0.05) 0%, transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 500px 200px at 50% 100%, rgba(245,158,11,0.03) 0%, transparent 70%),
    repeating-linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      transparent 0px, transparent 60px,
      rgba(96,165,250,0.02) 60px, rgba(96,165,250,0.02) 61px
    );
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 0;
}

/* ---------- 7e. WAVE SEPARATOR ---------- */
.section--wave-top {
  position: relative;
  padding-top: clamp(4rem, 5vw, 6rem);
}
.wave-separator {
  position: absolute;
  top: -1px; left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 50px;
  z-index: 3;
}
.wave-separator svg {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  display: block;
}
.wave-chevron {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -6px; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  background: var(--bg-primary);
  width: 40px; height: 40px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border-normal);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}

/* ---------- 7d. ORBIT SCENE — ANIMATED ROTATION ---------- */
.orbit-scene {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 700px;
  aspect-ratio: 1;
  margin: 8rem auto 2.5rem;
}
/* Ebook center — fixed */
.orbit-scene__center {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%; left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  z-index: 3;
}
.orbit-scene__bg-word {
  position: absolute;
  font: 900 clamp(4rem, 12vw, 10rem)/0.85 var(--font-display);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  white-space: nowrap;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 0%, transparent 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  pointer-events: none;
  user-select: none;
  z-index: 1;
}
.orbit-scene__bg-word--top {
  top: 5%; right: -10%;
}
.orbit-scene__bg-word--bottom {
  bottom: 10%; left: -15%;
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 9vw, 7rem);
}
.orbit-scene__mockup {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  width: clamp(220px, 30vw, 380px);
  filter: drop-shadow(0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)) drop-shadow(0 0 48px rgba(59,130,246,0.35));
}
/* Dashed orbit ring */
.orbit-scene__ring {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
}
/* Rotating track — holds the 3 cards */
.orbit-scene__track {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  animation: orbit-spin 45s linear infinite;
  z-index: 2;
}
@keyframes orbit-spin {
  to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
/* Each card positioned on the circle */
.orbit-scene__card {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%; left: 50%;
  width: clamp(240px, 32vw, 340px);
  transform:
    rotate(var(--angle))
    translateY(-320px)
    rotate(calc(-1 * var(--angle)));
  transform-origin: center center;
  /* Counter-rotate to keep text readable — done via inner wrapper animation */
}
.orbit-scene__card-inner {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
  background: var(--gradient-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: 1.25rem;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  animation: orbit-counter 45s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: inherit;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
}
@keyframes orbit-counter {
  to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(-360deg); }
}
/* Reuse existing orbital icon/text styles */
.orbital__icon {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 36px; height: 36px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--gradient-cta);
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  color: white;
  font: 700 0.75rem/1 var(--font-display);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px -6px rgba(99,102,241,0.5);
}
.orbital__text h3 {
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  margin-bottom: 0.375rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FBBF24 0%, #F59E0B 50%, #D97706 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}
.orbital__text p {
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.5;
}
/* Reduced motion: no spin */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .orbit-scene__track { animation: none; }
  .orbit-scene__card-inner { animation: none; }
}
/* Mobile: stack cards, no orbit */
@media (max-width: 899px) {
  .orbit-scene {
    aspect-ratio: auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    max-width: 100%;
  }
  .orbit-scene__center {
    position: relative;
    top: auto; left: auto;
    transform: none;
    text-align: center;
    order: -1;
  }
  .orbit-scene__mockup { width: 260px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .orbit-scene__ring { display: none; }
  .orbit-scene__track {
    position: relative;
    animation: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1rem;
  }
  .orbit-scene__card {
    position: relative;
    top: auto; left: auto;
    width: 100%;
    transform: none;
  }
  .orbit-scene__card-inner {
    animation: none;
    transform: none;
  }
}

/* ---------- 8. PAIN SECTION ---------- */
.pain-cards {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
@media (min-width: 768px) { .pain-cards { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); } }

.card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: 2rem;
  position: relative;
  transition: transform .4s ease, border-color .3s ease;
}
.card-glow { background: var(--gradient-card); }
.card-glow::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: -1px;
  border-radius: inherit;
  padding: 1px;
  background: var(--gradient-border-glow);
  -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#000 0 0);
          mask: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#000 0 0);
  -webkit-mask-composite: xor;
          mask-composite: exclude;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .4s;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.js-motion .card-glow:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
.js-motion .card-glow:hover::before { opacity: 1; }

.card h3 { margin-bottom: .75rem; font-size: var(--text-xl); }
.card p { color: var(--text-body); font-size: var(--text-base); }

.card__num {
  font: 700 var(--text-sm)/1 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  display: block;
}

/* Micro-CTA destacado */
.micro-cta {
  margin-top: 3rem;
  padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  max-width: 680px;
  margin-inline: auto;
}
.micro-cta::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  border-radius: inherit;
  padding: 1.5px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cyan-glow), var(--indigo-glow), var(--gold));
  -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#000 0 0);
  -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask-composite: exclude;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.micro-cta::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; right: 0;
  width: 40%; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(99,102,241,0.12) 40%, rgba(139,92,246,0.18) 70%, rgba(236,72,153,0.12) 100%);
  border-radius: 0 var(--radius-lg) var(--radius-lg) 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.micro-cta p {
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  font: 500 var(--text-base)/1.6 var(--font-body);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  max-width: 540px;
  margin-inline: auto;
}
.micro-cta .btn {
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}

/* ---------- 9. MECHANISM / EDUCATION ---------- */
.education__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: start;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .education__grid { grid-template-columns: 1.3fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; }
}
.education__body p { font-size: var(--text-lg); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; color: var(--text-body); }

/* ---------- 10. EVIDENCE — SPLIT LAYOUT ---------- */
.ev-split {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .ev-split {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
    gap: 3rem;
  }
}
.ev-split__left .eyebrow { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.ev-split__left h2 { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }
.ev-split__intro {
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.ev-split__note {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.6;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.ev-split__note::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; right: 0;
  width: 35%; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(99,102,241,0.12) 40%, rgba(139,92,246,0.18) 70%, rgba(236,72,153,0.12) 100%);
  border-radius: 0 var(--radius-lg) var(--radius-lg) 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .ev-split__left { position: sticky; top: 6rem; }
}

.ev-split__right {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0;
}
.ev-item {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
  padding: 1.5rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.ev-item:first-child { padding-top: 0; }
.ev-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.ev-item__arrow {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 36px; height: 36px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-normal);
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  font: 500 1rem/1 var(--font-body);
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  transition: background .3s, border-color .3s;
}
.ev-item:hover .ev-item__arrow {
  background: var(--gradient-cta);
  border-color: transparent;
  color: white;
}
.ev-item__body h3 {
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.ev-item__body p {
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.ev-item__body cite {
  display: block;
  font: 400 var(--text-xs)/1.5 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  font-style: normal;
}


/* ---------- 10b. PRODUTO COMPACT ---------- */
.section--produto-compact .product__body .section-head {
  margin-bottom: 2rem !important;
  padding-bottom: 0 !important;
  text-align: left;
}
.section--produto-compact .product__body .section-head p {
  margin-top: 0.75rem !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}
.section--produto-compact .product__body {
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}
.section--produto-compact .product__pillars {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .section--produto-compact .product__body .section-head {
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem !important;
  }
}

/* ---------- 11. PRODUCT SECTION ---------- */
.product__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: stretch;
  background: var(--gradient-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.product__grid .product__body {
  padding: 2rem;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .product__grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0;
  }
  .product__grid .product__body {
    padding: 2.5rem 3rem;
  }
}
.product__visual {
  position: relative;
  display: grid;
  place-items: stretch;
  min-height: 500px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.product__visual img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  max-width: none;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center;
  filter: none;
}
.product__pillars {
  list-style: none;
  display: grid;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 0;
}
.pillar {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 64px 1fr;
  gap: 1.25rem;
  align-items: start;
}
.feature-icon {
  width: 64px; height: 64px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--gradient-cta);
  display: grid; place-items: center;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 32px -8px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.5);
  color: #fff;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.feature-icon svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; }
.pillar h4 { margin-bottom: .35rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FBBF24 0%, #F59E0B 50%, #D97706 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }
.pillar p { color: var(--text-body); font-size: var(--text-base); }

/* ---------- 11b. PRODUCT SPLIT (flush-right diagonal) ---------- */
.product__grid-split {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: start;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}
.product__grid-split .product__body { padding: 0; }
.product__grid-split .product__pillars { margin-top: 0; }

.product__visual-split {
  position: relative;
  isolation: isolate;
  z-index: 2;
  overflow: hidden;
  height: 420px;
  background: var(--bg-primary);
  box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  /* full-bleed right edge on mobile too */
  margin-right: calc(-1 * var(--container-px-mobile));
  width: calc(100% + var(--container-px-mobile));
  clip-path: polygon(40px 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
}
.product__visual-split-bg {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  background-image: url('images/product-child.png');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  filter: blur(32px) brightness(0.42) saturate(1.1);
  transform: scale(1.18);
}
.product__visual-split img {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center center;
  filter: contrast(1.05) brightness(0.98);
}
.product__visual-split::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 3;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--gold-bright) 0%, var(--gold) 45%, #D97706 80%, rgba(217,119,6,0) 100%);
  clip-path: polygon(40px 0, 48px 0, 8px 100%, 0 100%);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.product__visual-split::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 2;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 70%, rgba(10,14,39,0.55) 100%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .product__grid-split {
    grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 1fr;
    gap: 3rem;
    align-items: start;
  }
  .product__grid-split .product__body { order: 1; padding-right: 1rem; }
  .product__visual-split {
    order: 2;
    height: 640px;
    /* flush-right: extend image past grid cell + container padding until viewport edge */
    margin-right: calc(-1 * (max(2rem, (100vw - 1200px) / 2) + 2rem));
    width: calc(100% + max(2rem, (100vw - 1200px) / 2) + 2rem);
    clip-path: polygon(70px 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  }
  .product__visual-split::before {
    clip-path: polygon(70px 0, 78px 0, 8px 100%, 0 100%);
  }
}

/* ---------- 12. ZIGZAG LAYOUT ---------- */
.zigzag {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
.zigzag__row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: center;
  max-width: 780px;
}
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .zigzag__row {
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
    gap: 0;
  }
}
.zigzag__num {
  font: 700 clamp(6rem, 14vw, 12rem)/0.85 var(--font-display);
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  letter-spacing: -0.05em;
  padding-right: 1.5rem;
  user-select: none;
  text-align: right;
}
.zigzag__card {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  background: var(--gradient-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: 1.75rem 2rem;
  transition: border-color .3s, transform .3s;
  overflow: visible;
}
.zigzag__card:hover {
  border-color: var(--border-strong);
  transform: translateY(-3px);
}
.zigzag__card-text { flex: 1; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
.zigzag__card-text h3 {
  font-size: var(--text-xl);
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FBBF24 0%, #F59E0B 50%, #D97706 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}
.zigzag__card-text p {
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.65;
}
/* Gradient transparente nos cards — ímpares lado direito, pares lado esquerdo */
.zigzag__card--grad-right::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; right: 0;
  width: 45%; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(99,102,241,0.08) 50%, rgba(139,92,246,0.12) 80%, transparent 100%);
  border-radius: 0 var(--radius-lg) var(--radius-lg) 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.zigzag__card--grad-left::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0;
  width: 45%; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(270deg, transparent 0%, rgba(99,102,241,0.08) 50%, rgba(139,92,246,0.12) 80%, transparent 100%);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg) 0 0 var(--radius-lg);
  pointer-events: none;
}
/* Ebook sobreposto na borda — absolute pra não afetar altura do card */
.zigzag__ebook {
  position: absolute;
  width: 220px;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)) drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(59,130,246,0.25));
  z-index: 2;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
}
.zigzag__ebook--right {
  right: -10.5rem;
}
.zigzag__ebook--left {
  left: -10.5rem;
}
/* Odd/even row positioning */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .zigzag__row--odd {
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
  }
  .zigzag__row--even {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
    margin-left: auto;
  }
  .zigzag__row--even .zigzag__num {
    order: 2;
    text-align: left;
    padding-left: 1.5rem;
    padding-right: 0;
  }
  .zigzag__row--even .zigzag__card {
    order: 1;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .zigzag__ebook { display: none; }
}

.inside__footer {
  margin-top: 3rem;
  text-align: center;
}
.inside__footer p {
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  max-width: 640px;
  margin: 0 auto 2rem;
}

/* ---------- 13. COMPARATIVE ---------- */
.compare-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) { .compare-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }

.compare-col {
  padding: 2.5rem;
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.compare-col--bad { opacity: 0.85; }
.compare-col--good {
  background: var(--gradient-card);
  border-color: var(--border-strong);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-card);
}
.compare-col h3 {
  font-size: var(--text-lg);
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.compare-col--bad h3 { color: var(--text-muted); }
.compare-col--good h3 { color: var(--cyan-glow); }
.compare-col ul { list-style: none; display: grid; gap: .85rem; }
.compare-col li {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 24px 1fr;
  gap: .75rem;
  align-items: start;
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.compare-col--bad li::before {
  content: '×';
  color: #ef4444;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  line-height: 1;
}
.compare-col--good li::before {
  content: '✓';
  color: #22c55e;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.compare__fecho {
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: var(--text-lg);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  font-weight: 500;
  font-style: italic;
}

/* ---------- 14. QUALIFICATION ---------- */
.qualify-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) { .qualify-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }

.qualify-col {
  padding: 2.5rem;
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.qualify-col__head {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .85rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.qualify-col__head h3 {
  font-size: var(--text-xl);
  color: var(--text-primary);
}
.qualify-col__icon {
  width: 40px; height: 40px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: grid; place-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.qualify-col--yes .qualify-col__icon {
  background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15);
  color: #22c55e;
  border: 1px solid rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.35);
}
.qualify-col--no .qualify-col__icon {
  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);
  color: #ef4444;
  border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.35);
}
.qualify-col ul { list-style: none; display: grid; gap: 1rem; }
.qualify-col li {
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  line-height: 1.55;
  color: var(--text-body);
  padding-left: 1.5rem;
  position: relative;
}
.qualify-col li::before {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.qualify-col--yes li::before { content: '✓'; color: #22c55e; }
.qualify-col--no li::before { content: '×'; color: #ef4444; font-size: 1.15rem; line-height: 1.4; }
.qualify__note {
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 2rem auto 2.5rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  font-style: italic;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.qualify__cta { display: flex; justify-content: center; }

/* ---------- 15. SCENES (8 cenas) ---------- */
.scenes__lead {
  font-size: var(--text-lg);
  color: var(--text-body);
  margin: 2rem 0 2.5rem;
  max-width: 68ch;
}
.scenes-list {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
  counter-reset: scene;
  list-style: none;
}
@media (min-width: 768px) { .scenes-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem 2rem; } }
.scenes-list li {
  counter-increment: scene;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem 1.25rem 4rem;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  position: relative;
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: var(--text-body);
  transition: border-color .3s;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.scenes-list li::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0;
  width: 50%; height: 4px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--cyan-glow) 0%, var(--indigo-glow) 50%, transparent 100%);
  pointer-events: none;
  border-top-left-radius: var(--radius-md);
}
.scenes-list li::before {
  content: counter(scene, decimal-leading-zero);
  position: absolute;
  left: 1.25rem;
  top: 1.15rem;
  font: 700 var(--text-lg)/1 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}
.scenes-list li:hover { border-color: var(--border-normal); }

.scenes__disclaimer {
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--text-faint);
  font-style: italic;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

/* ---------- 16. AUTHOR (Catarina) ---------- */
.author__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) { .author__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr; } }

.author__visual {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 900px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
/* Vertical name treatment — editorial side label, rotated -90deg so text reads bottom-up.
   Pre-rotation layout is a row (CATARINA | AZEVEDO) so that AFTER rotating -90deg
   the two lines become stacked vertically in the final visual.
   Absolute position so the huge pre-rotation width doesn't blow out the grid column. */
.author__name-vertical {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.02em;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(-90deg);
  transform-origin: center center;
  white-space: nowrap;
  pointer-events: none;
  user-select: none;
  line-height: 0.82;
}
.author__name-line {
  display: block;
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: clamp(7.5rem, 12vw, 11.5rem);
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  /* Gradient fade: top of line fully white, fading to transparent at bottom
     (after -90deg rotation this becomes a left-to-right fade in the final visual). */
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,1) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.85) 30%, rgba(255,255,255,0.35) 70%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  color: transparent;
  /* Cyan-glow halo: editorial glow that dialogues with the cosmic dark bg */
  filter:
    drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.28))
    drop-shadow(0 0 44px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.14));
}
@media (max-width: 899px) {
  .author__visual {
    min-height: 500px;
  }
  .author__name-line {
    font-size: clamp(4rem, 15vw, 6.5rem);
  }
}
@media (min-width: 1200px) {
  .author__name-line {
    font-size: clamp(9rem, 11vw, 12.5rem);
  }
}
.author__body p {
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  color: var(--text-body);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

/* ---------- 17. OFFER BACKGROUND ---------- */
.section--offer {
  background: var(--bg-primary);
  padding-block: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw + 1rem, 5rem) clamp(2rem, 3vw + 1rem, 4rem);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.section--offer::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -30%; left: -20%;
  width: 60%; height: 160%;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    -35deg,
    transparent 0px,
    transparent 30px,
    rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.12) 30px,
    rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.12) 32px
  );
  transform: rotate(-5deg);
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 0;
}
.section--offer::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -30%; right: -20%;
  width: 60%; height: 160%;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    35deg,
    transparent 0px,
    transparent 30px,
    rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1) 30px,
    rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1) 32px
  );
  transform: rotate(5deg);
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 0;
}
.section--offer .container {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}
/* Meia lua brilhante no topo */
.section--offer .offer__card {
  position: relative;
}
.section--offer .offer__card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -80px; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 700px; height: 160px;
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse 350px 80px at 50% 100%, rgba(96,165,250,0.35) 0%, rgba(99,102,241,0.15) 40%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: -1;
  border-radius: 50%;
}

/* ---------- 15b. OFFER BONUS INLINE ---------- */
.offer__bonus-inline .bonus-card__icon {
  width: 48px; height: 48px;
  min-width: 48px;
}
.offer__bonus-inline .bonus-card__icon svg {
  width: 22px; height: 22px;
}
.offer__bonus-inline {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  padding: 1.25rem;
  background: var(--gradient-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.offer__bonus-inline::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: -1px;
  border-radius: inherit;
  padding: 1.5px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--warm-pink), transparent);
  -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#000 0 0);
  -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask-composite: exclude;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.offer__bonus-inline .bonus-label {
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--gold);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}
.offer__bonus-inline h3 {
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  margin: 0.35rem 0;
}
.offer__bonus-inline p {
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.offer__bonus-price {
  margin-top: 0.5rem !important;
  font: 500 var(--text-sm)/1 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-primary);
}
.offer__bonus-price del { color: var(--text-muted); }
.offer__bonus-price strong { color: #22C55E; }

/* ---------- 16a. OFFER SPLIT LAYOUT ---------- */
.offer__split {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: start;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) {
  .offer__split {
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr;
    gap: 3rem;
  }
}
.offer__left .eyebrow { margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
.offer__left h2 { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }
.offer__right {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  padding: 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.offer__right::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: -1px;
  border-radius: inherit;
  padding: 1.5px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cyan-glow), var(--indigo-glow), var(--gold));
  -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#000 0 0);
  -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask-composite: exclude;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.offer__right { overflow: visible; padding-top: 0; }
.offer__right-mockup {
  width: 420px;
  max-width: 110%;
  display: block;
  margin: -6rem auto 1.5rem;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 16px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)) drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(59,130,246,0.3));
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;
}

/* ---------- 16b. COUNTDOWN TIMER ---------- */
.countdown-timer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin: 2rem 0;
}
.countdown-timer__block {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-normal);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  min-width: 72px;
}
.countdown-timer__num {
  font: 700 clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.25rem)/1 var(--font-display);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}
.countdown-timer__label {
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
}
.countdown-timer__sep {
  font: 700 1.5rem/1 var(--font-display);
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  margin-top: -1rem;
}

/* ---------- 17. OFFER ---------- */
.offer__card {
  max-width: 720px;
  margin: 3rem auto 0;
  padding: clamp(2rem, 3vw, 3.5rem);
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-strong);
  border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-elevated);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.offer__card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse at top, rgba(99,102,241,0.12), transparent 60%);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.offer__urgency {
  position: relative;
  padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,158,11,0.08), rgba(236,72,153,0.05));
  border: 1px solid var(--border-gold);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.offer__urgency strong { color: var(--gold-bright); }

.offer__stack {
  list-style: none;
  margin: 2rem 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .85rem;
  position: relative;
}
.offer__stack li {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 24px 1fr auto;
  gap: .85rem;
  align-items: center;
  padding: .85rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border-subtle);
  font-size: var(--text-base);
  color: var(--text-body);
}
.offer__stack li::before {
  content: '✓';
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
}
.offer__stack li .stack-val {
  font: 500 var(--text-sm)/1 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-muted);
}
.offer__stack li.is-bonus {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(245,158,11,0.06), transparent);
  padding-inline: .75rem;
  border-bottom-color: var(--border-gold);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
}
.offer__stack li.is-bonus::before { color: var(--gold-bright); }
.offer__stack li.is-bonus .stack-val { color: var(--gold-bright); }

.offer__old {
  position: relative;
  font: 500 var(--text-base)/1 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-decoration: line-through;
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: .5rem;
}
.offer__price {
  position: relative;
  text-align: center;
  margin: 1.5rem 0 2rem;
}
.offer__price__label {
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1 var(--font-mono);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  margin-bottom: .5rem;
  display: block;
}
.offer__price__big {
  font: 700 clamp(3.5rem, 8vw, 5.5rem)/1 var(--font-display);
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 0%, var(--cyan-glow) 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  display: block;
}
.offer__price__note {
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1.5 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-top: .5rem;
}
.offer__countdown {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 2rem 0 1.5rem;
  position: relative;
}
.countdown-ring {
  width: 160px; height: 160px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: conic-gradient(var(--cyan-glow) 0deg, var(--electric-blue) 270deg, rgba(96,165,250,0.12) 270deg, rgba(96,165,250,0.12) 360deg);
  display: grid; place-items: center;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-blue);
  position: relative;
}
.countdown-ring::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 6px;
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border-radius: inherit;
}
.countdown-ring__inner { position: relative; text-align: center; }
.countdown-ring__num {
  font: 700 clamp(2.25rem, 4vw, 3rem)/1 var(--font-display);
  color: #fff;
  display: block;
}
.countdown-ring__label {
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1 var(--font-mono);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  margin-top: .35rem;
  display: block;
}
.offer__micro {
  text-align: center;
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1.6 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

/* ---------- 18. GUARANTEE ---------- */
.guarantee-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 3rem;
}
@media (min-width: 900px) { .guarantee-grid { grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr; gap: 4rem; } }

/* Guarantee stamp — rotating text around dark circle */
.guarantee-stamp {
  position: relative;
  width: 220px; height: 220px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.guarantee-stamp__text {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  animation: stamp-rotate 25s linear infinite;
}
.guarantee-stamp__text text {
  font: 700 0.75rem/1 var(--font-mono);
  fill: var(--cyan-glow);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
}
@keyframes stamp-rotate { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

.guarantee-stamp__center {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 28px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, #1A2050 0%, #0A0E27 100%);
  border: 2px solid var(--border-normal);
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  place-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 48px rgba(96,165,250,0.1);
}
.guarantee-stamp__num {
  font: 800 clamp(3rem, 6vw, 4.5rem)/1 var(--font-display);
  display: block;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #94A3B8 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}
.guarantee-stamp__label {
  font: 700 var(--text-lg)/1 var(--font-display);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  display: block;
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #E2E8F0 0%, #64748B 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .guarantee-stamp__text { animation: none; }
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .guarantee-badge::before { animation: none; }
}

.guarantee__body h2 { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.guarantee__body p { color: var(--text-body); margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.65; }
.guarantee__note {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
  background: var(--gradient-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--text-body);
  font-style: italic;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.guarantee__note::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; right: 0;
  width: 35%; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(99,102,241,0.08) 50%, rgba(139,92,246,0.12) 80%, transparent 100%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* ---------- 19. BONUS CARD ---------- */
.bonus-card {
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 3rem auto 0;
  padding: 2.5rem;
  background: var(--gradient-card);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}
.bonus-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  border-radius: inherit;
  padding: 1px;
  background: var(--gradient-border-glow);
  -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#000 0 0);
          mask: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#000 0 0);
  -webkit-mask-composite: xor;
          mask-composite: exclude;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.bonus-card__icon {
  width: 80px; height: 80px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--gradient-cta);
  display: grid; place-items: center;
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 16px 40px -8px rgba(99,102,241,0.5);
}
.bonus-card__icon svg { width: 36px; height: 36px; }
.bonus-card h3 { margin-bottom: .5rem; }
.bonus-card .bonus-label {
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1 var(--font-mono);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  color: var(--gold-bright);
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: .35rem;
}
.bonus-card p { color: var(--text-body); font-size: var(--text-base); }

/* ---------- 20. FAQ ---------- */
.faq-list {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin: 2rem auto 0;
}
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .faq-list {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0.75rem;
  }
}
.faq-item {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: border-color .3s;
}
.faq-item[open] { border-color: var(--border-strong); }
.faq-item summary {
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  cursor: pointer;
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}
.faq-item summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
.faq-item summary::after {
  content: '+';
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-weight: 300;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 28px; height: 28px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-normal);
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  transition: transform .3s ease, background .3s, border-color .3s;
}
.faq-item[open] summary::after {
  content: '−';
  background: var(--gradient-cta);
  border-color: transparent;
  color: white;
}
.faq-item__body {
  padding: 0 1.25rem 1.25rem;
  color: var(--text-body);
  line-height: 1.6;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
}

/* ---------- 21. FINAL CTA ---------- */
.final-cta {
  background: var(--gradient-hero-bg);
  padding-block: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3.5rem);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: center;
}
.final-cta::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(
    -35deg,
    transparent 0px, transparent 40px,
    rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.06) 40px, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.06) 42px
  );
  pointer-events: none;
}
.final-cta--border-top::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 5%, var(--cyan-glow) 20%, var(--indigo-glow) 50%, var(--gold) 80%, transparent 95%);
  z-index: 4;
}
.final-cta__inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 820px; margin-inline: auto; }
.final-cta h2 {
  font-size: var(--text-5xl);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}
.final-cta p {
  font-size: var(--text-lg);
  color: var(--text-body);
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  max-width: 68ch;
  margin-inline: auto;
}
.final-cta__tagline {
  font-family: var(--font-serif);
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: var(--text-2xl);
  line-height: 1.3;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  margin: 2rem 0;
  text-align: center;
}
.final-cta__tagline strong {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #60A5FA, #8B5CF6);
  -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}
.final-cta__quote-mark {
  font-size: 1.5em;
  color: var(--cyan-glow);
  opacity: 0.5;
  font-style: normal;
}
.final-cta__cta { margin-top: 2rem; }
.final-cta__micro {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1.6 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}

/* ---------- 22. FOOTER ---------- */
.footer {
  background: var(--bg-primary);
  padding-block: 3rem 4rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.footer__grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  max-width: 800px;
  margin-inline: auto;
}
.footer__brand {
  font: 700 var(--text-lg)/1 var(--font-display);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  margin-bottom: .75rem;
}
.footer__disclaimer {
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  color: var(--text-faint);
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 800px;
}
.footer__bottom {
  padding-top: 2rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  font: 500 var(--text-xs)/1 var(--font-mono);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}
.footer__bottom a { color: var(--text-muted); }
.footer__bottom a:hover { color: var(--cyan-glow); }

/* ---------- 23. STICKY MOBILE CTA ---------- */
.sticky-cta {
  position: fixed;
  left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  z-index: 90;
  padding: .85rem 1rem calc(.85rem + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
  background: rgba(10, 14, 39, 0.92);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-normal);
  transform: translateY(110%);
  transition: transform .4s ease;
  display: none;
}
.sticky-cta.is-visible { transform: translateY(0); }
.sticky-cta .btn {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
  min-height: 56px;
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .sticky-cta { display: block; }
  body { padding-bottom: 90px; }
}

/* ---------- 24. REVEAL MOTION ---------- */
/* Estado inicial: VISÍVEL por padrão (no-JS friendly) */
.reveal { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
/* Só esconde se o JS injetar .js-reveal (IO disponível + motion permitida) */
html.js-reveal .reveal {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(24px);
  transition: opacity .8s ease-out, transform .8s ease-out;
  will-change: opacity, transform;
}
html.js-reveal .reveal.is-in {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  *, *::before, *::after {
    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    scroll-behavior: auto !important;
  }
}

/* ---------- 25. UTILS ---------- */
.sr-only {
  position: absolute;
  width: 1px; height: 1px;
  padding: 0; margin: -1px;
  overflow: hidden;
  clip: rect(0,0,0,0);
  white-space: nowrap;
  border: 0;
}
.text-center { text-align: center; }
.mt-4 { margin-top: 2rem; }


@media (max-width: 767px) {

  /* --- 2.1 HERO: aproximar imagem do texto (v3: margin-top mais agressivo) --- */
  .hero__inner {
    gap: 0.25rem;

  .hero__visual {

  /* --- 2.4 ZIGZAG mobile: numero dentro do card, menor, a esquerda --- */

  /* --- 2.5 AUTORA: nome diagonal -20deg + padding reduzido ~70% --- */

  /* --- 2.6 OFERTA: mockup maior transbordando pra fora do card --- */
  .offer__card {
